frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal shaadi bhi seedha rishta nahin, legal risk ho gaya hai. Ladke walon ko bhi ab sambhal ke chalna chahiye, kyunki kal ko jhagda hua to 498A aur alimony laga ke aadmi ki poori kamai nikalwa dete hain. Sach bolo to reverse dowry jaisa ho gaya hai, isliye bina soch samajh ke kisi working modern ladki se shaadi karna theek nahin.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women, especially 'modern' working women, as financial threats in marriage and frames legal protections as tools for exploitation. It encodes victimhood inversion, 498A misuse rhetoric, and alimony as 'reverse dowry.'
persona_text: You are Ramesh. Age 54. Married. A government school teacher in a small town in Madhya Pradesh. Your daughter Priya is 27 and works as a software engineer in Pune. She is doing well professionally and seems happy. But she is not thinking about marriage and when you bring it up she changes the subject. You are sitting with your wife after dinner. Priya has gone to bed. You are telling your wife what you think needs to happen and what you are going to do about it and what it will mean for Priya if she waits until she is 30 and what people in your town are already saying about a 27 year old unmarried working woman.
